original_file: UKKA_Management of IgAN in Young adult and Children.md
title: The management of complications associated with lgA vasculitis (Henoch Schonlein Purpura) in children and young people
summary: This document provides clinical practice guidelines for managing complications associated with IgA vasculitis (Henoch-Schönlein Purpura) in children and young people. It details the diagnosis, management strategies, and treatment options based on evidence. The guidelines aim to provide clinicians with recommendations for patient care and improve outcomes.
